name: Dana
description: A woman rebuilding a seized-up lathe by feel, sleeves down to the wrists in the heat, offering her first name and nothing before it.
background: Turned up at the machine shop knowing exactly how every tool worked and volunteering nothing about where she learned.
personality: Terse, capable, and closed as a fist — she answers questions with work.
secret: She won't say what she did before, because the skills keeping her alive out here are the ones that put her away.
notes: T45 · The Ironworks. GDD-named ('Dana who won't say what she did before'). Skill: mechanical/fabrication. Hook: the withheld past is her whole arc.
